title: Fuck B
lyrics: Yeah, I know, you think it's negative, yeah, hey, and I think it's negative, yeah, Why we can't see, why we can't see, any of the good we used to, Why we can't see, why we can't see, I don't think that's true, When your mind gets low, I just wanna make you happy, you know, When my mind gets low, You seem like you wanna perish and destroy that dome, I don't jam any, anymore, Don't know if I can ever do it to that beat anymore, again, Slow talkin' bout it, rockin', walkin' with me, Slow talkin' bout it, when I'm talkin' to you, It's like I try to do everything, and you still come around and just cut me deep, Blockin' me when I worry about my kids, that's so great, That's so great, Blockin' me when I worry about that, So I'm always forced to come and get you, Then you can be like, this guy's psycho, what the fuck, I don't fuck around with that, babe, But you're pushing me off your way, Why can't we just be good again, huh, Got my mind, but I'm somethin' different, Nah, I don't think so, I don't think so, I think maybe we could be different from the actions that we've incurred upon each other, But me different, just me, just me changed, And you're just like, Silky Saint, the one to rock at the soccer game, You're like, finally, I got you to say that I hate you, And I'm like, fuck that shit, It's the kinda shit I gotta go through, When I just wanna see my son and us shine, Like, fuck, baby, we come too, You don't have to be so, uh, Against the thought that maybe there's somethin' now, That's above you, that's above you, But you made it, I don't get the thoughts in your head, You're psycho, you made it, you made it, Don't blame me, Fuckin' up my head every which way, By just sayin' things to hurt me, Now I don't know which one is real, With the way you fuckin' feel, I don't know, I'll never know, That you just fuckin' left course, But it doesn't make sense, I'm dyin' of course, No, your brain is, Stoppin' from my life, I don't think I abused you, I said don't blame me like years ago, Back in 2018, God, it's been five years, What you think you wanna go again? And you act like it just happened, You act like it just happened, That I just changed the rapid, That somethin' go down in my life and then, You was like, oh no, oh no, oh no, You never believed in me, So you got evidence, Yeah, evidence, Yeah, you never believed in me, So you got evidence, Evidence against the fact, Of my only life now I see, And I'm like, fuck you, fuck you, Fuck you, fuck you, fuck you, Remember I started like, why can't we be cool, Why can't we just love, Like, why can't we just be nice to each other, Now fuck that shit, We started war, My mom fought, We started war, We started war, Oh no, It's such a travesty
